offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes financial discrepancies. We streamline bank reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Difficulty in reconciling bank transactions leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to freelancers with a demo video
Community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users test Transaction matching on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Collect 10 brief interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import feature for existing data
